toast.new-record.1: Floor {{floor}}... deeper than ever. The old rails hold the mark.
toast.new-record.2: At floor {{floor}}, violet light runs through the shaft. A new depth is remembered.
toast.new-record.3: The gauge settles at {{floor}}. Somewhere above, the old lift answers.
toast.no-skull-key: No key, no descent. The cavern does not open for the unproven.
toast.no-foothold: The shaft remembers no descent yet.
toast.memory-spent: The old marks remain, but the shaft has forgotten every path.
repair.inspect: The lift is dead. Five iridium bars could brace the frame... and the empty socket looks made for a battery pack.
repair.question: A hollow socket waits beneath the rust. Set five iridium bars around a battery pack?
toast.repair-complete: Violet light takes the old rails. The shaft remembers how to move.
config.enabled.name: Enable elevator
config.enabled.desc: Enable or disable Qi's Fading Elevator.
config.stops.title: Elevator stops
config.floor-interval.name: Stop interval
config.floor-interval.desc: How many floors apart the regular elevator stops are. Your deepest remembered floor is always available.
config.fading.title: Remembered floor
config.fade-per-hour.name: Fade per hour
config.fade-per-hour.desc: Percentage of the current remembered floor lost per in-game hour. Time spent sleeping also counts.
config.luck-influence.name: Luck effect
config.luck-influence.desc: How strongly daily luck affects fading. Good luck slows it, while bad luck speeds it up. Set this to 0 to ignore luck.
